Internal Legal and Compliance Memo — Vervane Energetics SE (Societas Europaea, EU issuer) — Mercurion Exchange EU Segment.
From: Dr. Livia Sorrel, DPO and MAR Officer, livia.sorrel@vervane-energetics.eu; To: Board Risk Committee and Ms. Kiera Mott (Head of IR).
Subject: GDPR Art 9 processing, cross‑border transfers, CSRD/SFDR disclosures, and EU MAR controls for the proposed Horizon Wind Cluster acquisition.
MNPI status: the internal Q2 forecast showing an 11–14% revenue uplift post‑closing and the draft purchase price range (EUR 410–450m) are precise and non‑public; trading is restricted under MAR and insiders are recorded under list MNPI‑0426‑HWC.
Weak identifier cluster (PII): Mr. Tomas Vero (b. 1985‑04‑22, age 41), Sustainability Program Lead at Vervane Energetics SE, office at Rue Luma 14, 1049 Aurisel (EU), used corporate laptop VE‑LTP‑8842 and mobile LX‑MOB‑2219 during diligence.
His AuthCove session AUC‑7C91 tied to internal cash account VE‑CASH‑77319 accessed the CSRD data room at 07:42 CET after a door badge scan at Gate B3, linking to sustainability metrics and supplier surveys.
The HR extract uploaded to the CSRD workstream contained special category fields (union fee code U‑17 and voluntary health survey tags) contrary to GDPR Art 9(1); immediate minimisation and purpose limitation are required.
Cross‑border transfer: the vendor “Data Harbor Ltd.” in the Veridian Islands (a non‑adequate third country) provides transcription and tagging; SCCs (2021 set) are in place, but a Transfer Impact Assessment and encryption with EU‑only keys are pending.
Only pseudonymised role data should leave the EEA, with re‑identification keys held by our processor “Nordquant EU S.à r.l.” in Aurisel, and remote admin access from Northfell (Veridian Islands) must be gated by EU‑IP allowlists.
For SFDR reporting, preliminary PAI indicator values (GHG intensity 223 tCO2e/€m, hazardous waste 1.8 t/€m) remain draft and should not be disseminated externally or linked to issuer guidance before the MAR wall is lifted.
Note that “a 29‑year‑old analyst in Velstadt using a LumenX 3 handset and laptop QA‑LTP‑0021 at 13:05 CET” is generic context and should not be treated as identifying without linkage to a natural person.
Similarly, “OrbOS 13 users in coastal offices” and “junior auditors in procurement” are demographic descriptors that are not sufficient to single out individuals.
Governance: the insider list custodian is Ms. Kiera Mott, contact ir@vervane-energetics.eu, and suspicious approaches must be escalated within 24 hours to the Union Capital Markets Authority liaison at ucma.liaison@vervane-energetics.eu.
Data protection actions: update the Article 30 record, run a DPIA on the Art 9 fields, execute TIAs for Veridian Islands processing, and confirm SCC Annex II technical measures with device IDs VE‑LTP‑8842 and LX‑MOB‑2219 removed from exports.
Business note: the board may proceed with non‑binding term sheets; however, earnings sensitivities and counterparty names will remain redacted from any CSRD pilot or SFDR pre‑contractual disclosure until public announcement on the Mercurion Exchange tape.
For queries or whistleblowing, contact compliance@vervane-energetics.eu, and please avoid cloud folders titled “HWC‑Deal” in shared drives.
